dialogos.texto_en: (The special exhibition was about introducing\n the Kyushu warlords, with a focus on the Shimazu clan,\n who had a liaison with the Ryukyu Kingdom.)
(There were many exhibits unique to the local area,\n and Miku was especially excited, and told me\n about various things.)
(However, when I spoke to her, she seemed absent-minded\n and disappeared without me realizing it.)
(Miku seems normal, aside from when I speak to her.\n All and all, she seems to be enjoying the trip.)
(There is no doubt that Miku is worried about something.\n It's yet to be confirmed whether I am the cause\n or reason for it...)
(This is not the time to be worried about wanting \n to kiss her anymore. If Miku is suffering, I have to do \n something about it. After all, I am Miku's%p-2;――%p;)
Well then, shall we go to the neighboring art museum?
There's also an art museum, huh?
Yes, our tickets include\nboth the museum and the art museum.
